mapper.sql: id, process_key, process_name, bpmn_xml, designer_type, design_schema_json, version, deployment_id, status, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: select from process_definition order by updated_at desc nulls last, id desc
select from process_definition where process_key = #{processKey} order by version desc, id desc
select from process_definition where status = #{status} order by updated_at desc nulls last, id desc
mapper.update: update process_definition set process_key = #{processKey}, process_name = #{processName}, bpmn_xml = #{bpmnXml}, designer_type = #{designerType}, design_schema_json = #{designSchemaJson}, version = #{version}, deployment_id = #{deploymentId}, status = #{status}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, created_by = #{createdBy}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{id}
